creator: amracks@gmail.com
text:
sorry, I should have mentioned I am using:

firefox-esr-52.2.1,1

from the FreeBSD pkg repo

I certainly did not test it, but it appears to still be working here (first test not second test):

http://www-pw.physics.uiowa.edu/das2/javaPlatformTest.jbf.html

which I found via googling "java web start test" and also an internal corporate site that I cannot disclose and would not be very useful even if I did.

I do not claim to know what in libxul icedtea-web requires or what an actual good test would be.
